raw_input.title: Python Developer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Remote software engineer building software for global payroll, benefits, taxes and compliance. Develop secure APIs for frontend and backend applications. Python, FastAPI, microservices, SQL and Agile.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years, APIs, product delivery and remote-friendly collaboration.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: real remote backend role with strong stack overlap.
